response: {"commands":[{"command_template":"fastq-dump {accession}","description":"Download raw CLIP-seq sequencing reads (iCLIP, HITS-CLIP, PAR-CLIP) from public repositories (e.g., SRA/ERA) using accession numbers listed in Supplementary Table 1.","required_inputs":["Public CLIP-seq dataset accession numbers (Supplementary Table 1)"],"outputs":["FASTQ files (raw sequencing reads)"],"parameters":{"{accession}":"SRA/ERA accession number (e.g., SRRxxxxxxx / ERRxxxxxxx) from Supplementary Table 1"}}]}
